description_long: This is a modern double grave monument set on a rectangular concrete base, featuring two distinct upright headstones—one black and one gray—crafted from polished granite. The headstones are asymmetrical, with the black stone having a rounded top and the gray stone a straight edge, separated by a vertical gap. The grave cover is split into two matching gray granite slabs, each bordered by black granite strips, giving a sense of symmetry and division. A small potted plant is placed at the head of the grave, adding a touch of greenery and life to the otherwise somber setting. The black headstone bears engraved inscriptions and a metallic cross, indicating the names and memory of the deceased. The overall design is sleek, with clean lines and a combination of polished and matte stone finishes, typical of contemporary cemetery monuments.
description: A modern double grave monument with black and gray granite headstones, split grave covers, and a potted plant at the head. The black headstone features inscriptions and a metallic cross.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-tone headstones, the potted plant on the left, and the clear division between the black and gray stones.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the grave covers and the layered granite construction, with the headstones visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engraved inscriptions on the black headstone, the metallic cross, and the symmetry of the grave covers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the potted plant on the right and the layered structure of the grave covers and base.
